subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord and my Forgiver, my All-Pardoning Lord, my Compassionate Master, my Kind Sovereign, my Protecting Shield and my Sheltering Refuge! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و عفوی و غفوری و رب حنونی و ملیک روفی و صون حمایتی و کهف کلاتی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
